results.title: Maryam Savari
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist (Generative AI\ RL\ DL\ ML)
...
Senior Data Scientist at [ONEOK](https://www.linkedin.com/company/oneok)
...
I received my Ph.D. degree in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Texas A&M University. I have 10 years of research experience and my research interest is in Artificial intelligence, Data Science, building agents that can quickly learn to navigate efficiently and act safely in the environment, applications of reinforcement learning and machine learning techniques to real-world problems, autonomous driving, and deep learning. I published some in the above areas and my latest project was on improving end-to-end reinforcement learning algorithms for autonomous driving. I interned as a data scientist at Dell Technology during the summer of 2020. During this experience, I designed and improved a dynamic deep-learning system (LSTM) that predicts the Time to Complete (TTC) and features events for process mining with an error reduction of 32% over their current approach. I worked closely with a team of data engineers and BI analysts to improve efficiency. I have 5 years experiences of teaching and leading discrete mathematics, Python, and Java labs in TAMU (Graduate Teaching Assistants (GTA)). In addition, I was a software engineer for a year at Mesiniaga company in Malaysia. My publications:
...
### Senior Data Scientist at [ONEOK](https://www.linkedin.com/company/oneok) (Current)
...
Engaged in various research and development projects focusing on web-based interface applications utilizing Large Language Models (such as GPT-3, GPT-3.5 and BERT) to enhance the experience for BMW's internal staff and customers. Spearheaded an innovative project aimed at transforming natural language into SQL queries, fetching pertinent data from the database, and subsequently analyzing and visualizing the information using Large Language Models (LLMs).
...
1- Conducted research and development in the realm of Reinforcement Learning (RL), with a specific focus on enhancing the Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) algorithm to expedite the training process. Pioneered the design and refinement of a comprehensive end-to-end solution within the domain of Reinforcement Learning. I bring to the table over three years of extensive experience in both research and coding across a spectrum of areas, including Reinforcement Learning, Deep Learning, Machine Learning, utilization of OpenAI Gym environments, and working with the Carla platform. 2- Involved in researching, designing, and developing 3 AR and VR projects in the Unity environment. Projects include distance learning with AR, VR human interaction in an image gallery, and weight conception in a VR environment.
...
Throughout my internship at Dell Technologies, I conceptualized and enhanced a dynamic deep learning system, leveraging LSTM (Long Short-Term Memory), to forecast Time to Completion (TTC) and characterize events for process mining. This initiative led to an impressive 32% reduction in error compared to their existing methodology. My collaborative efforts extended to closely working alongside a team of data engineers and Business Intelligence (BI) analysts, collectively aimed at optimizing operational efficiency.

## AI Initiatives
...
### Pipeline Control AI Investment
...
Investment in CruxOCM's AI-driven pipeline control technology through $17 million Series A funding
...
ONEOK invested alongside Microsoft Ventures Fund in CruxOCM, a Calgary-based company developing co-pilot technologies for pipeline control room operators. The technology includes pipeBOT, max-OPT and leanOPT focused on automated pipeline control and AI-driven software to improve operational and sustainability efficiencies.
...
### AI Data Center Infrastructure Support
...
ONEOK is actively pursuing opportunities to provide energy infrastructure for AI data centers across the United States
...
The company's intrastate assets are strategically located in premier natural gas supply-and-demand centers close to many proposed AI data center projects, providing speed-to-market advantages. ONEOK can meet timing needs with existing infrastructure rather than requiring new construction.
...
Multiple organic growth projects to support energy demand including from AI applications
...
Projects include Elk Creek pipeline expansion, West Texas NGL Pipeline expansion, Denver-area refined products expansion, and Medford fractionator rebuild. These projects enhance ONEOK's ability to serve growing energy demand from various sources including AI data centers.
...
How is ONEOK positioned to serve AI data centers?
...
ONEOK's pipeline infrastructure is strategically located near premier natural gas supply-and-demand centers close to many proposed AI data center projects, providing speed-to-market advantages with existing assets rather than requiring new construction.
...
What AI investments has ONEOK made?
...
ONEOK invested in CruxOCM's $17 million Series A funding round alongside Microsoft Ventures Fund for AI-driven pipeline control technology to enhance operational efficiency and safety.
...
How does AI data center demand benefit ONEOK?
...
AI data centers require reliable, around-the-clock power generation, often supplied by natural gas plants. ONEOK's extensive pipeline network can transport the natural gas needed to power these energy-intensive facilities.
...
What is ONEOK's growth strategy related to AI?
...
ONEOK is focused on leveraging its existing infrastructure to serve AI data center energy needs while investing in AI technologies to improve its own operations through partnerships and direct investments.
...

results.title: Nick Davis
highlights:
Director of Data Science, Engineering, & Governance at [ONEOK](https://www.linkedin.com/company/oneok)
...
Dr. Nick Davis is an AI and Data leader with experience building world-class teams, capturing ideas from collaborative R&D projects, forging and refining via customer feedback through proof of concept (PoC) engagements, and delivering results via deployment of robust, scalable models into customer-facing products and services. He has built and led Data Science teams in healthcare, bioinformatics, and energy. He has over two decades of industry and academic leadership experience in AI/ML, software development and architecture, operations, and research. Dr. Davis is proficient in analyzing large datasets and leveraging AI models across several industries, as well as mining clinical patient datasets to study chronic disease. He has been an invited speaker at regional and national conferences, including ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge, Discovery, and Data Mining (KDD), American Medical Informatics Association Annual Conference, and the Oklahoma Supercomputing Symposium. For his doctoral work, Dr. Davis conducted bioinformatics research in genome-wide association studies (GWAS), SNP-SNP and gene-gene interaction analysis, network centrality, fMRI and brain volumetric data analysis, with results published in Nature Genes and Immunity and other peer-reviewed journals. As an academic research faculty, he collaborated with clinicians to analyze medication adherence and study its impact on chronic disease. He was awarded a Harold Hamm Diabetes Center Enrichment Grant in collaboration with a clinical partner to perform an analysis of sensor-augmented pump therapy data from continuous glucose monitoring of type 1 diabetes pediatric and adolescent patients. As a founding member of an Internet security startup, he was co-inventor of a patented image authentication system that formed the basis of the company's flagship product. He helped lead the company from its inception through R&D and the patent process, to successful launch of several authentication products. Dr. Davis holds BS, MS and PhD degrees in Computer Science from the University of Tulsa.
...

results.title: Business Process Professional | Remotepulse
highlights:
Business Process Professional
...
# Business Process Professional
...
Posted Jun 22, 2026
...
#WeAreONEOK – Fortune 500 company. 100+ years in business. Leading midstream service provider. Safety first. Sustainable operations. Environmentally responsible. Employee focused.
...
Job Profile Summary
...
With a focus on ONEOK’s Refined, NGL, and Crude footprint, this Commercial Business Process Optimization (BPO) team member will collaborate closely with business stakeholders and IT to support and enhance the RightAngle application landscape. The role requires prior RightAngle functional and/or technical experience and will operate across four distinct RightAngle instances with varying levels of automation and customization. Responsibilities include leading and supporting projects, defining requirements and testing criteria, providing day‑to‑day business support, and consulting on value‑driven improvement opportunities. The ideal candidate brings a solid understanding of liquid hydrocarbon commercial, logistical, and accounting business models, along with strengths in project execution, process improvement, communication, and cross‑functional partnership, and demonstrates the ability to listen to business needs and translate them into effective, scalable solutions. This role will serve in a lead role capacity for all Business Process Optimization functions (BPO) including project management, business process mapping and review, product backlog management and business intelligence/data governance initiatives.
...
- Identify business problems or management objectives that can be addressed through data analysis and provide guidance for data quality enhancements.
...
- Independently develop and maintain business intelligence analyses in support of strategic initiatives.
...
- Recommend and assist with implementing data governance solutions.
...
- Bachelor's Degree Finance, Business Administration, Accounting, Engineering, Construction Management, Computer Science, MIS, or combination of formal education and the following job-related experience preferred:
...
- 3–6 years of experience supporting RightAngle end‑to‑end commercial or operational business processes within an asset‑intensive or transaction‑driven environment, with exposure to enterprise systems used for deal execution, scheduling, settlement, or financial close.

- Demonstrated ability to analyze, document, and improve business processes, translating stakeholder needs into clear functional requirements and partnering with technology teams to implement sustainable, scalable solutions.

- Working knowledge of commercial, accounting, or supply chain process flows, including how upstream decisions impact downstream execution, controls, and reporting across multiple functions.

- Experience supporting RightAngle process enhancements, system changes, or operational initiatives in a production environment, including user support, issue resolution, data validation, testing coordination, and change adoption.
...
Expected Salary Range
...
$92,000.00 - $138,000.00

Summary: Coordinate, develop, and maintain SCADA applications to ensure data integrity, optimize IT infrastructure, and support regulatory compliance. Lead system enhancements, process improvements, and cross-functional collaboration to deliver scalable, reliable solutions across operational areas. Key Responsibilities: Develop and maintain SCADA applications to support real-time data accuracy and infrastructure performance. Analyze, test, and modify existing systems to improve functionality and integrate process improvements. Identify system defects and inefficiencies, leading the development and deployment of targeted enhancements. Support project management efforts, including cost and time forecasting, solution design, and lifecycle planning. Ensure compliance with PHMSA regulations through documentation, audits, and system updates. Utilize Control Room Management (CRM) protocols for SCADA system changes, point-to-point verifications, and controller training. results.title: Trevor Thienhardt
highlights:
Director, IT Applications at ONEOK
...
Trevor Thienhardt is a Director of IT Applications - Measurement at ONEOK, Inc. He is currently responsible for leading an IT organization supporting Natural Gas Measurement related applications. This includes polling software, field software, measurement software, multiple reporting and analytics solutions, and many application integrations. Major applications supported by his organization include FLOWCAL, TESTit, CALCit, AUTOSOL Communication Manager, and many Data Products built using TIBCO Data Virtualization, TIBCO Spotfire, Crystal Reports, and SQL Server Reporting Services. For 18 years, Trevor has been an IT Leader in the Natural Gas midstream industry. He has led multiple companies and project teams through large scale implementations of vendor software and custom developed application solutions. He has extensive experience with the entire suite of Quorum midstream applications. He led a multi-year project for the Natural Gas Gathering & Processing segment of ONEOK, Inc. to build a custom Well Connect lifecycle application using the Microsoft Dynamics CRM platform. One of his teams also built the initial customer portal for ONEOK gathering and processing customers to obtain their own data via integrations with multiple back-office systems. Trevor thrives off helping others with strategic decisions and creating a vision of the future applications that could be achieved. He enjoys deep research into new technologies and how his business partners might leverage them to be more successful. He also prides himself in his project management knowledge, including Agile concepts and experience leading teams using Agile project management. When he is not working, he stays busy with his wife and two kids attending many sporting events and activities or taking family vacations. Summers at the lake are a favorite past time.
...
Serving in IT Business Relationship Manager role for Natural Gas Measurement business group. Responsible for leading IT organization that supports natural gas measurement related applications. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. results.title: Larry Winters
highlights:
Enterprise transformation leader | Director, AI Data & Digital Transformation at ONE Gas | Governance, risk, and operating capability at scale
...
Director, AI, Data & Digital Transformation at [ONE Gas](https://www.linkedin.com/company/one-gas)
...
I lead enterprise transformation at ONE Gas, a regulated natural gas utility serving 2.6M+ customers across Oklahoma, Kansas, and Texas. My current accountability spans AI strategy, data governance, analytics platforms, and business automation — but the underlying work is the same one I've done for 25 years: turning ambiguous enterprise problems into operating capability. Regulated industries are entering a decade where trust, governance, and risk operationalization will determine which companies adapt and which fall behind. My role is to make sure ONE Gas is on the right side of that line — that as new capabilities are introduced, they're introduced with the governance, accountability, and operating discipline a regulated utility requires. I've built this kind of capability before. Inside ONE Gas, I established the Technology and Data Compliance program, including the company's TSA cybersecurity compliance posture, and stood up executive-level governance for vulnerability management. Before ONE Gas, I founded and led businesses that scaled fast (Tri-State Industrial Group: #1 fastest-growing in Oklahoma City; Persimmon Group: Inc. 500/5000) and consulted with Fortune 1000 companies including JB Hunt, Williams, Capital One, Boeing, and Doosan Heavy Industries. Pattern across the work: I'm the person companies bring in when something important needs to exist that doesn't yet. Leader. Author. Speaker. Husband to Rose, father of three. Based in Tulsa.
...
### Director, AI, Data & Digital Transformation at [ONE Gas](https://www.linkedin.com/company/one-gas) (Current)
...
Accountable for enterprise AI, data, and digital transformation strategy at ONE Gas. Lead a function spanning enterprise architecture, data governance, data engineering, data science, and business automation, partnering with executive leadership and the SVP/CIO on enterprise direction. Established a new enterprise function from the ground up: defined the operating model, organizational structure, and leadership team across six functional areas
...
- Authored the enterprise AI strategy and the supporting governance framework, positioning ONE Gas to lead its peer group of ten regulated gas utilities in a benchmarking assessment
- Operationalize trust and risk in emerging technology adoption, translating board-level expectations on responsible AI into enforceable enterprise practice
- Lead enterprise data strategy and governance, ensuring data assets meet the quality, integrity, and compliance standards of a regulated utility.
...
Established the enterprise Technology and Data Compliance function within the Legal department. Built the ONE Gas Transportation Security Administration (TSA) cybersecurity compliance program from inception — translating federal security directives into enterprise operating practice. Installed executive-level governance and oversight for vulnerability management. The function I built remains the company's primary mechanism for technology regulatory compliance.
...
When ChatGPT launched in November 2022, the world discovered AI. I've been working with technology for thirty years — AI, data and analytics for most of it. That didn't make me smarter. It made me harder to impress.
...
of what actually creates value
...
What to scale. What to fix. What to stop before it
...
time and attention. Keep
...
The industry has this backwards. We roll out platforms before we define the operating model that sustains them. We build AI pilots before we decide who's accountable when one of them gets a decision wrong. We stand up data platforms with no clear definition of what "data quality" means in a regulated context.

• Design end-to-end AI/ML and Generative AI solution architectures for enterprise use cases, including model integration, orchestration, APIs, data flows, and downstream system interactions.
...
• Define and implement reference architectures, architecture standards, and best practices for AI platforms and shared services.
...
• Collaborate with business stakeholders, product teams, data scientists, and engineering teams to convert business problems into scalable technical solutions.
...
• Lead architecture design for multi-cloud and hybrid AI environments, ensuring scalability, resiliency, security, and interoperability.
...
• Ensure solutions comply with Responsible AI, governance, data handling, testing, and risk management requirements.
...
• Drive POCs, architecture assessments, technical reviews, and production onboarding for AI applications and platforms.
...
• Partner with platform, cloud, security, and DevSecOps teams to ensure production readiness, observability, access control, and operational excellence.
...
• Establish reusable design patterns for prompt engineering, RAG, model serving, agentic workflows, and AI service integration where applicable.
...
• Strong critical thinking,
...
• Deep hands-on expertise in Generative AI, LLMs, ML systems, RAG, vector databases, prompt design, and AI application integration.
...
• Strong knowledge of cloud platforms such as Azure, AWS, or GCP, including AI/ML services, storage, networking, and security.
...
• Expertise in designing scalable, secure, and resilient enterprise architectures for data- and AI-driven applications.
...
• BS, B-TECH, or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Information Systems, Engineering, or Mathematics.
...
• 10+ years of experience in solution architecture, enterprise application architecture, or AI/ML platform architecture.
...
• Strong understanding of DevSecOps, CI/CD, monitoring, observability, and platform engineering concepts.
...
• Expertise in API architecture, microservices, distributed systems, system integration, and event-driven architectures.
...
• Experience with AI governance, Responsible AI, model risk, compliance, testing, and production controls.
...
• Exposure to agentic AI frameworks, AI gateways, federated AI patterns, and enterprise AI shared services.
...
• Hands-on knowledge of Databricks, Kubernetes, container platforms, and MLOps tooling.
...
, and intelligent automation
...
• Certifications in cloud architecture, AI/ML, or enterprise architecture are a plus.

results.title: Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
highlights:
Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
...
# Data Scientist
...
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
...
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
...
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy advanced analytics, machine learning, and Generative AI solutions to address complex healthcare and business problems using largescale structured and unstructured data
...
- Applies advanced techniques including statistics, machine learning, simulation, and mathematical modelling
...
- Build and optimize LLM based applications, including Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks, to enable accurate, context aware, and explainable insights from enterprise healthcare data sources such as clinical notes, claims, provider data, and policy documents
...
- Develop, evaluate, and finetune machine learning and GenAI models, including prompt engineering, retrieval strategies, and model evaluation techniques to improve accuracy, relevance, and performance
...
- Translate complex analytical and GenAI outputs into clear, actionable insights for business stakeholders, product teams, and
...
to support data driven decision
...
- Support prototyping, validation, and deployment of GenAI and ML solutions, working with engineering teams to ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and maintainable. Continuously stay current with advancements in LLMs, GenAI frameworks, and healthcare AI trends, contributing innovative ideas and improvements to Optum’s capabilities
...
### Required Qualifications:
...
- Bachelor’s Degree (preferably in information technology, engineering, math, computer science, analytics, engineering or other related field)
...
- 4+ years of experience in handling/active development in data science projects
...
- 4+ years of experience in Microsoft Azure Cloud, Databricks, Mlflow, Spark SQL & Python
...
- Experience using Machine Learning Algorithms: Linear & Logistic Regression, Time Series analysis, Support Vector Machine, K-Means clustering, K-Nearest Neighbors Decision Trees, Random Forest, Naive Bayes, PCA, SVD, Artificial Neural Networks, Association Rules, Genetic Algorithm, Optimization, Bagging and Boosting algorithms etc.
...
- Understanding of data, schema, data model, machine learning and how to bring efficiency in big data related life cycle
...
- Proven skills to create opportunities using machine learning or artificial intelligence
...
Optum, part of UnitedHealth
...
, is a global health services and technology company revolutionizing healthcare
...
Prairie, Minnesota, Optum serves patients, providers, payers, and pharmacies worldwide with innovative platforms for care optimization, claims processing, and population health management.
